tax_note: Corporation Tax 25%; VAT registration required above £90K revenue

vat_gst.name: VAT
vat_gst.registration_threshold_note: Mandatory above threshold. Voluntary registration available below — can be beneficial to reclaim VAT on business purchases.
vat_gst.digital_products: VAT applies at 20% on digital products sold to UK consumers. B2B sales to VAT-registered businesses use reverse charge. Post-Brexit, EU sales follow destination country rules.

digital_product_tax: Digital products (software, ebooks, SaaS, templates) are subject to VAT at 20%. If selling to EU consumers post-Brexit, you must register for OSS (One Stop Shop) in an EU member state or register individually in each country where you sell.

entity_comparison.tax_treatment: Income taxed at personal rates (20-45%). Class 2 and 4 National Insurance on profits.
entity_comparison.best_for: Starting out; revenue under £40K/year; minimal paperwork

entity_comparison.tax_treatment: Corporation Tax 25% (19% for profits under £50K via small profits rate). Director salary + dividends is the standard tax-efficient extraction strategy.
entity_comparison.best_for: Revenue above £40K/year; seeking contracts with larger companies; liability protection

isp_note: Full fibre widely available via BT/Virgin Media
